IT WAS DESIGNED BY M.C.MOXON WITH GLASS FROM

IS THEN USED AS SHAPE OF THE U-235 CROSS SECTION
AND THE SHAPE OF THE LI-6 CROSS SECTION IS OBTAINED.

VALUE OF THE LITHIUM CROSS SECTION BETWEEN 2
